common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: After arranging shipment (v2.logistics.ship_order) for the integrated channel, use this api to get the tracking_number, which is a required parameter for creating shipping labels. The api response can return tracking_number empty, since this info is dependent from the 3PL, due to this it is allowed to keep calling the api within 5 minutes interval, until the tracking_number is returned.

request_params.name: order_sn
request_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an order.

request_params.name: package_number
request_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order. You should't fill the field with empty string when there isn't a package number.

request_params.name: response_optional_fields
request_params.description: Indicate response fields you want to get. Please select from the below response parameters. If you input an object field, all the params under it will be included automatically in the response. If there are multiple response fields you want to get, you need to use English comma to connect them. Available values: plp_number, first_mile_tracking_number,last_mile_tracking_number

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

children.name: tracking_number
children.description: The tracking number of this order.

children.name: plp_number
children.description: The unique identifier for package of BR correios.

children.name: first_mile_tracking_number
children.description: The first mile tracking number of the order. Only for Cross Border Seller

children.name: last_mile_tracking_number
children.description: The last mile tracking number of the order. Only for Cross Border BR seller.

children.sample: Buyers CVS closed， waiting for buyer to reselect another CVS stores，auto cancel time 2021-01-01
children.name: hint
children.description: Indicate hint information if cannot get some fields under special scenarios. For example, cannot get tracking_number when cvs store is closed.
For drivers to quickly identify parcel to be picked up. Only returned for ID local orders who using instant+sameday for delivery.
children.name: pickup_code

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/get_tracking_number?access_token=access_token&order_sn=201214JASXYXY6&package_number=-&partner_id=partner_id&response_optional_fields=first_mile_tracking_number&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
